shadestepper.name: Shadestepper
shadestepper.description: Shadesteppers hide themselves and deal devastating damage at the right time. (Glass Cannon, Burst Damage)

trickster.name: Trickster
trickster.description: Tricksters summon clones and confuse enemies with various tricks. (CC, Tricks)

acrobat.name: Acrobat
acrobat.description: Acrobats are agile and combo-heavy fighters. (Combos, Speed)

spinattack.name: Spin Attack
description: Click Combo: RIGHT-LEFT-RIGHT
damaging enemies over a large area.
 Mana Cost: 40
 Total Damage: 150% (of your DPS)
( Damage: 120%)
( Thunder: 30%)
 Area of Effect: 4.5 Blocks (Circle-Shaped)

spinAttackCost1.name: Cheaper Spin Attack
description: Reduce the Mana cost of Spin Attack.
 Mana Cost: -10
Required Ability: Spin Attack

daggerProficiency.name: Dagger Proficiency I
description: Increases your Walk Speed and
Main Attack's damage by +5%.

doubleSpin.name: Double Spin
description: Spin Attack will activate twice, with a
larger area of effect on the second spin.
 Total Damage: -40% (of your DPS)
( Damage: -40%)
 Area of Effect: +2 Blocks (Circle-Shaped)

poisonedBlade.name: Poisoned Blade
description: For every 2% or 2 Raw Main Attack Damage you have
from items, gain +5/3s Poison Damage. (Max 50/3s)
Your Main Attack gains additional range.
 Range: +1 Block

dash.name: Dash
description: Click Combo: RIGHT-RIGHT-RIGHT
 Mana Cost: 20

doubleSlice.name: Double Slice
description: Your Main Attack will hit twice,
but deal -40% damage per hit.

smokebomb.name: Smoke Bomb
description: Click Combo: RIGHT-RIGHT-LEFT
Throws a bomb that slowly emanates smoke,
damaging all enemies in it every 0.5s.
 Mana Cost: 35
 Total Damage: 35% (of your DPS)
( Damage: 25%)
( Air: 5%)
( Earth: 5%)
 Range: 10 Blocks
 Duration: 5s
 Area of Effect: 3 Blocks (Circle-Shaped)

dashCost1.name: Cheaper Dash
description: Reduce the Mana cost of Dash.
 Mana Cost: -5

multihit.name: Multihit
description: Click Combo: RIGHT-LEFT-LEFT
Unleashes a rapid flurry of 8 hits to enemies
facing you, dealing heavy damage.
 Mana Cost: 40
 Total Damage: 40% (of your DPS, per hit)
( Damage: 30%)
( Water: 10%)
 Range: 3 Blocks (Cone-Shaped)

stickyBomb.name: Sticky Bomb
description: Smoke Bomb will stick to enemies
 Total Damage: +10% (of your DPS)
( Fire: +10%)
Required Ability: Smoke Bomb

assassinEarthPath.name: Earth Mastery
description:  Earth Damage: +2-4
 Earth Damage: +20%

assassinThunderPath.name: Thunder Mastery
description:  Thunder Damage: +1-8
 Thunder Damage: +10%

assassinWaterPath.name: Water Mastery
description:  Water Damage: +2-4
 Water Damage: +15%

assassinAirPath.name: Air Mastery
description:  Air Damage: +3-4
 Air Damage: +15%

assassinFirePath.name: Fire Mastery
description:  Fire Damage: +3-5
 Fire Damage: +15%

stomp.name: Ripple
description: Falling 5 blocks or more deals
damage around you when you land.
This damage is increased by +12%
for every additional block you fall
afterwards, up to +10 blocks.
 Total Damage: 120% (of your DPS)
( Damage: 90%)
( Water: 15%)
( Air: 15%)
 Area of Effect: 8 Blocks (Circle-Shaped)

backstab.name: Backstab
description: Makes Multihit a single devastating hit.
If you strike an enemy from behind, it
deals double the damage.
 Mana Cost: -5
 Total Damage: 300% (of your DPS)
( Damage: 250%)
( Earth: 50%)
Min Shadestepper Archetype: 2

vanish.name: Vanish
description: Dash will hide you into the shadows. You
cannot heal or gain mana while in this state.
(Attack or get hit to cancel)
 Effect: Invisibility to Self
 Duration: 5s
 Cooldown: 5s

bamboozle.name: Bamboozle
description: Multihit will instead teleport you forward
and strike with a brutal fiery slash.
 Total Damage: 350% (of your DPS)
( Damage: 300%)
( Fire: 50%)
 Range: 6 Blocks
 Area of Effect: 5 Blocks (Circle-Shaped)
 Cooldown: 5s

hop.name: Hop
description: Leap forwards when you double jump.
 Cooldown: 2s

fatalstrike.name: Surprise Strike
description: Your first hit after casting Vanish
will deal +80% more damage.
Min Shadestepper Archetype: 3

shadowClones.name: Mirror Image
description: Summon 3 Mirror Clones  after reappearing
from Vanish that will follow and protect you.
When hit, lose a Mirror Clone , reducing
-25% of incoming damage and granting you
a damage bonus for 3s. (1s cooldown)
 Effect: 30% Damage Bonus (⚔) to self
 Cooldown: 15s
Min Trickster Archetype: 2

lacerate.name: Lacerate
description: Spin Attack will lunge you forward,
deal 3 strikes and then lunge you upward.
Using Hop while Lacerate is active launches you further.
 Total Damage: 90% (of your DPS, per strike)
( Damage: 60%)
( Air: 20%)
( Water: 10%)
Min Acrobat Archetype: 3

silentKiller.name: Silent Killer
description: Resets Vanish's cooldown

foulPlay.name: Foul Play
description: While Mirror Image is active,
Bamboozle will slay a Mirror Clone 
instead of having a cooldown.
Reduce the Mana cost of Multihit.
 Mana Cost: -5
Required Ability: Mirror Image
Min Trickster Archetype: 2

wallOfSmoke.name: Wall of Smoke
description: Smoke Bomb will throw +2 bombs.
 Total Damage: -10% (of your DPS)
( Damage: -10%)
Required Ability: Smoke Bomb

explodingClones.name: Last Laugh
description: When losing any Clone , it will cast
one of your spells before dying.
Mirror Clones  will cast Multihit
Min Trickster Archetype: 3

psithurism.name: Psithurism
description: Increase your Walk Speed by +20%
and your Jump Height by +1.

betterSmokeBomb.name: Rolling Fog
description: Increase Smoke Bomb's range
 Range: +10 Blocks
 Area of Effect: +1 Block (Circle-Shaped)
Required Ability: Smoke Bomb

shadowtravel.name: Shadow Travel
description: Gain +120% Speed Bonus (➲)
when in Vanish.

multihitCost1.name: Cheaper Multihit
description: Reduce the Mana cost of Multihit.
 Mana Cost: -5

finality.name: Finality
description: Multihit's damage ramps up every
Damage bonus caps at 8 hits.
 Total Damage: +6% (of your DPS, per hit)
( Damage: +4%)
( Air: +2%)

shadowSiphon.name: Shadow Siphon
description: Reduces Vanish's cooldown by -1.75s after
striking an enemy from behind with Backstab.

mirage.name: Mirage
description: After using Bamboozle or Shadow Projection
to teleport, leave behind a Mirage Clone 
which draws mobs within 8 blocks towards it.
Mirage Clones  disappear when an enemy
is within 0.75 blocks or when they expire,
and will cast Smoke Bomb with Last Laugh.
 Duration: 5s
 Cooldown: 2s

smokeBombCost1.name: Cheaper Smoke Bomb
description: Reduce the Mana cost of Smoke Bomb.
 Mana Cost: -5
Required Ability: Smoke Bomb

discombobulate.name: Blazing Powder
description: Spin Attack and Lacerate will
 Total Damage: +20% (of your DPS)
( Damage: +20%)

weightless.name: Weightless
description: You gain +1 Mana if you
hit an enemy while airborne.
Min Acrobat Archetype: 3

blackHole.name: Black Hole
description: Smoke Bomb will pull nearby enemies.
 Range: 6 Blocks

chainedHits.name: Sandbagging
description: Reduce the cooldown on all of your
abilities by 30% every time you get hit
for less than 10% of your max health.
 Cooldown: 1s
Min Trickster Archetype: 3

betterMultihit.name: Mutilate
description: Increase Multihit's amount of hits by +3.
Increase Finality's damage cap by +3 hits.

swanDive.name: Swan Dive
description: Landing 15 hits against an enemy while
midair grants you +1 Momentum . (Max 10)
Ripple consumes your Momentum ,
releasing a powerful explosion that deals
massive damage and briefly blinds enemies.
For each stack of Momentum , this
explosion deals +10% more damage.
While midair, hold shift to quickly drop down.
 Total Damage: 480% (of your DPS, over 5 hits)
( Damage: 400%)
( Earth: 40%)
( Air: 40%)
 Area of Effect: 12 Blocks (Circle-Shaped)
 Effect: Blindness () to Enemies
 Duration: 1s
Min Acrobat Archetype: 6

bigHit.name: Violent Vortex
description: Dealing over 1.5x of your max health as
damage in a single hit will deal 45% of
the damage to other nearby enemies.
 Area of Effect: 10 Blocks (Circle-Shaped)
 Cooldown: 2s

duplicity.name: Duplicity
description: Summon +2 additional Mirror Clones 
with Mirror Image.
 Cooldown: +5s
- Wall of Smoke
Required Ability: Mirror Image
Min Trickster Archetype: 3

rightingReflex.name: Righting Reflex
description: When you hold shift while airborne, slowly
glide and become immune to fall damage. (Max 10s)

marked.name: Marked
description: Smoke Bomb will add +1 Mark  to
Marked  enemies will take +7% damage
from attacks for each mark they have.
Marked  will decay once every 10s.
Min Shadestepper Archetype: 5

maliciousMockery.name: Malicious Mockery
description: Last Laugh stores a number of Tricks  on
enemies based on the type of Clone .
Casting Dash while sneaking will detonate
all nearby stored Tricks , dealing damage
based on how many stacks were consumed.
Mirror Clones  apply +1 Trick  per hit.
Mirage Clones  apply +2 Tricks  per hit.
Shadow Clones  apply +8 Tricks  per hit.
 Total Damage: 10% (of your DPS, per Trick)
( Damage: 10%)
 Range: 32 Blocks
 Area of Effect: 2 Blocks (Circle-Shaped)
Required Ability: Last Laugh
Min Trickster Archetype: 5

stanceChange.name: Shurikens
description: After using Dash, you prepare
+3 shurikens. (Max 9)
Your next Main Attack will throw all
 Total Damage: 120% (of your DPS, per shuriken)
( Damage: 100%)
( Fire: 20%)
 Range: 50 Blocks

multiTeleportation.name: Blade Fury
description: Multihit gains extra damage and
can be aimed in all directions.
 Multihit Damage: +10% (of your DPS, per hit)
( Thunder: +10%)

hoodwink.name: Hoodwink
description: After killing an enemy, salvage 50% of
their Tricks . (Max 10 per mob, 40 total)
Casting Spin Attack while sneaking will
transfer salvaged Tricks  onto enemies
Required Ability: Malicious Mockery

dashSlash.name: Dancing Blade
description: When using Swan Dive with 3+ Momentum , you
will leap back into the air 0.25s after landing.
Required Ability: Swan Dive

betterFatalstrike.name: Ambush
description: Increases Surprise Strike's
damage by +40%.
Required Ability: Surprise Strike

markPulls.name: Death Magnet
description: When exiting Vanish, pull all
nearby Marked  mobs towards
where you entered Vanish.
 Range: 20 Blocks

distraction.name: Distraction
description: Detonating 15+ Tricks  on enemies will
Debuffs applied with Tricks  will last
+0.4s longer for each extra Trick 
 Effects: -15% Damage Bonus () to Enemies
 Duration: 10s
Required Ability: Malicious Mockery

walljump.name: Wall Jump
description: Reduces Hop's cooldown by
-1s. Using Hop into a wall
Min Acrobat Archetype: 5

dashCost2.name: Cheaper Dash II
description: Reduce the Mana cost of Dash.
 Mana Cost: -5

misdirection.name: Misdirection
description: Detonating 25+ Tricks  on enemies
will make them Confused .
Confused  enemies take +30% more
 Thunder damage from you and
will take damage whenever they attack.
You may store +15 more Tricks  on enemies.
 Total Damage: 160% (of your DPS)
( Damage: 130%)
( Thunder: 30%)
 Cooldown: 0.5s
 Duration: 15s
Required Ability: Malicious Mockery

nightcloakKnives.name: Nightcloak Knives
description: If cast while in Vanish,
Spin Attack will consume all
Marks  from nearby enemies.
For every 2 Marks  consumed,
summon a Knife. (Max 5 Knives)
Dealing damage will send your
Knives to your target, dealing 13%
of the damage you dealt per Knife.
 Range: 6 Blocks (Circle-Shaped)
 Duration: 40s

multihitCost2.name: Cheaper Multihit II
description: Reduce the Mana cost of Multihit.
 Mana Cost: -5

shadowProjection.name: Shadow Projection
description: When you double jump, throw a Shadow Clone 
in the direction you are facing.
Double jump again while sneaking to
teleport to the clone, detonating it.
Shadow Clones  will cast Spin Attack
with Last Laugh.
 Total Damage: 300% (of your DPS)
( Damage: 250%)
( Fire: 50%)
 Range: 32 Blocks
 Area of Effect: 5 Blocks (Circle-Shaped)
 Duration: 8s
 Cooldown: 8s

spinAttackCost2.name: Cheaper Spin Attack II
description: Reduce the Mana cost of Spin Attack.
 Mana Cost: -5
Required Ability: Spin Attack

aerialAce.name: Aerial Ace
description: Hitting an enemy with Swan Dive
gives you a damage boost.
 Effect: +35% Damage Bonus (⚔) to Self
 Duration: 7.5s
Required Ability: Swan Dive

spinAttackmarked.name: Fatal Spin
description: Increases Spin Attack and Lacerate's range
and damage, and adds +1 Mark  to enemies hit.
 Total Damage: +20% (of your DPS)
( Damage: +20%)
 Area of Effect: +1 Block (Circle-Shaped)
Min Shadestepper Archetype: 8

toxicSludge.name: Toxic Sludge
description: Detonating 20+ Tricks  on enemies
Contaminates  them with toxic ooze.
Contaminated  enemies take +30% more
 Earth damage from you and will explode
on death, damaging nearby enemies.
You may store +15 more Tricks  on
 Total Damage: 400% (of your DPS)
( Damage: 350%)
( Earth: 50%)
 Area of Effect: 5 Blocks (Circle-Shaped)
 Duration: 25s
Required Ability: Malicious Mockery

echo.name: Echo
description: After losing a Mirror Clone , your
next Spin Attack or Smoke Bomb will be
copied by all active Clones .
Required Ability: Mirror Image
Min Trickster Archetype: 5

betterLacerate.name: Eviscerate
description: Lacerate deals more damage,
and will slash +1 more time.
 Total Damage: +10% (of your DPS)
( Thunder: +10%)

bigHit2.name: Bladestorm
description: Increases Violent Vortex's damage
by +55% and increases the damage
requirement to be 2.5x your max health.
Required Ability: Violent Vortex

shadowDash.name: Dissolution
description: When entering and exiting Vanish, become immune to
knockback and gain resistance for a brief moment.
 Effect: +60% Resistance Bonus (✾) to Self
 Duration: 0.5s
Min Shadestepper Archetype: 2

markedMana.name: Harvester
description: Gain +2 Mana for every leftover Mark 
when killing an enemy, and for every Mark 
you consume with your abilities.

smokeBombCost2.name: Cheaper Smoke Bomb II
description: Reduce the Mana cost of Smoke Bomb.
 Mana Cost: -5
Required Ability: Smoke Bomb

rangeMultihit1.name: Far Reach
description: Increase the range of Multihit.
 Range: +2 Blocks

moreMarks.name: More Marks
description: Increase your maximum Marks  by +2.

deflagrate.name: Deflagrate
description: Bamboozle coats enemies struck with a
flammable catalyst, making them +1% Enkindled 
The catalyst flares up when it reaches 100%
or at the end of its duration, dealing damage
based on how Enkindled  the target was.
Enkindled  enemies take +30% more
 Fire damage from you.
 Total Damage: 15% (of your DPS, per 1% Enkindle)
( Damage: 12%)
( Fire: 3%)
 Duration: 8s
 Cooldown: 8s
Min Trickster Archetype: 8

ricochets.name: Ricochets
description: Your Shurikens will bounce 2 times
 Range: 12 Blocks
Min Acrobat Archetype: 8

shindeiru.name: Satsujin
description: If an enemy has 4+ Marks , your next
Backstab will deal +200% damage, or your next
Powder Special will deal +100% damage.
Both consume all Marks  on the enemy.
 Cooldown: 15s (per enemy)
Min Shadestepper Archetype: 12

noxiousHaze.name: Noxious Haze
description: Smoke Bomb makes you and any allies
become Noxious  while standing in it,
which lingers after leaving the area.
While Noxious , deal +10% damage to
enemies for every debuff they have. (Max 5)
Allies only receive 30% of the bonus.
 Duration: 3s
Required Ability: Smoke Bomb
Min Trickster Archetype: 11

jasminBloom.name: Jasmine Bloom
description: After spending 40 Mana or gaining 4 Momentum ,
an area underneath you blooms and damages
enemies below it every 0.3s.
The duration is reset and the radius is
increased after every bloom. (Max 5 Blooms)
 Total Damage: 120% (of your DPS, from bloom)
( Damage: 75%)
( Earth: 15%)
( Water: 15%)
( Air: 15%)
 Duration: 5s
 Area of Effect: +1.5 Blocks (per bloom)
Min Acrobat Archetype: 12

soulSiphon.name: Soul Siphon
description: Detonating 30+ Tricks  on enemies will
make them 200% Drained  and take
+30% more  Water damage from you.
Whenever you or an ally attacks a
Drained  enemy, siphon 7.5% of it,
converting it into 7.5% Overhealth ❤
that decays over 20s. (Max 25%)
You may store +20 more Tricks  on enemies.
 Cooldown: 2s
 Duration: 25s
Required Ability: Malicious Mockery

jasminBloomExplosion.name: Petal Storm
description: A maximum sized Jasmine Bloom will transform
Swan Dive into a huge petal storm, consuming
your bloom to give it increased damage and range
 Explosion Damage: +200%
 Area of Effect: +3 Blocks
Required Ability: Swan Dive

betterMarkedMana.name: Devour
description: Harvester will give +2 Mana.

markedDamage.name: Marked for Death
description: Increases Marked's damage
bonus by +4%.
